# Refined Mortgage Group

> Plain-English mortgage guidance for Wisconsin homebuyers from Ethan Brooks (Mortgage Advisor & Branch Manager, NMLS #1639987), powered by Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation (NMLS #2289). Equal Housing Opportunity. This is not a commitment to lend; rates and terms are subject to change.

Refined Mortgage Group helps Wisconsin buyers — especially first-time buyers — understand and navigate the mortgage process without jargon.

## Key facts
- Advisor: Ethan Brooks, NMLS #1639987
- Lender: Fairway Independent Mortgage Corporation, NMLS #2289
- Service area: Wisconsin
- Contact: 414-488-0438 · ethan@trustrefined.com
- Book a call: https://calendly.com/ethan-brooks/15min

## Educational content (/blog and /learn)
- How much house you can afford in Wisconsin
- You don't need 20% down (down payments & PMI)
- Beating cash offers; avoiding home-sale contingencies
- Rent vs. buy and the cost of waiting
- The mortgage process, credit, and qualifying
